findings.title: dead-code 削除順序が要件 3 に未明示
findings.rationale: src/core/parser/review-findings.ts は R4 で関数削除済みで FindingSeverityCounts interface のみ残存し、ParsedStepResult.scores フィールドから参照されている。src/kernel/review-findings.ts も同様。完全削除には step-types.ts の scores フィールドと関連 import の同時除去が必要だが、要件 3 の記述は「等」で省略しており実装者が削除対象を誤認するリスクがある。受け入れ基準に typecheck green が含まれるため実質ブロックではない。

findings.title: D4 residual risk: manifest-shaped JSON array still misclassified as directory
findings.rationale: A file whose first JSON element has both `name: string` and `type: string` fields (e.g. a manifest with `[{ type: "file", name: "..." }]` entries) will still trigger `isGitHubDirectoryListing` and be misclassified. The design acknowledges this and calls out the `sha` field as a future mitigation. Acceptable for this bug-fix scope given the dramatically reduced false-positive surface.

findings.title: T-07 wording: testing a private function via direct export is the wrong default
findings.rationale: `isGitHubDirectoryListing` is declared file-scoped (not exported) in design.md, but T-07 lists testing it directly as the primary option before the end-to-end mock alternative. Implementers should prefer the mock-`verifyFindingRefs` path to avoid leaking a test-only export into production code.

observations.title: Bug (a) confirmed: `parseFindings` missing `f["line"] !== null` guard
observations.rationale: `parseObservations` line 232 already has `o["line"] !== null` in the guard; `parseFindings` line 162 does not. `null` satisfies `!== undefined` and `typeof null !== "number"`, so any finding with `line: null` causes the entire array to be rejected. Asymmetry confirmed in source.

observations.title: Bug (b) confirmed: `stripNullDeep` in codex path only — runtime split
observations.rationale: `stripNullDeep(json)` is called before `parseInput` in the codex path, masking the line 162 defect. Local and managed runtimes go directly through `parseFindings` without null stripping. Same agent output passes in codex and fails in local/managed.

observations.title: Bug (c) confirmed: `parseReviewScores` has zero production callers
observations.rationale: grep across src/ shows `parseReviewScores` is only defined, never called. `ParsedStepResult.scores` in step-types.ts is declared but never set or read. Dead path confirmed; deletion is correct.

observations.title: Bug (d) confirmed: `Array.isArray(parsed)` misclassifies any JSON array file as a directory
observations.rationale: Any file whose content is a top-level JSON array (test fixtures, lock excerpts, schemas) is classified as a directory and the finding is pushed to `nonExistent`. The shape-based `isGitHubDirectoryListing` fix correctly narrows detection to GitHub directory entry format.

observations.title: Security: `ref.file` path traversal mitigated by `encodeURIComponent`
observations.rationale: `filePath.split("/").map(encodeURIComponent).join("/")` encodes each path segment before the GitHub API call. Agent-supplied `file` fields cannot perform path traversal beyond what the GitHub API boundary already enforces.

message: spec-review iteration 1 completed with verdict: approved
